title: AI Resume Builder — How to Automate Job Applications & Resume Writing
summary: Jobright is an AI resume builder platform used by 2M+ people to automate job applications, resume tailoring, role matching, and cover letter generation. The platform includes features like application tracking, insider referral finding, and an AI career coach.
writeup: This video covers Jobright, an AI resume builder platform with a user base of more than 2 million, and walks through how it automates job applications, resume tailoring, role matching, and cover letter generation. It matters because it consolidates several stages of the job search into a single workflow rather than separate tools. Key features include application tracking, insider referral finding, and an AI career coach.
